products.title: Hutch Leather
products.description: The Hutch belt is a sleek wardrobe essential, defined by its minimalist statement buckle and understated elegance, designed to be worn on repeat.

products.title: Hollyhock Rivet Gold
products.description: The Hollyhock Rivet belt carries an elevated edge. Inspired by Déhanche’s signature Revenge belt, its design reimagines grunge with elegance : each grommet set in polished 24K gold and silver, a study in contrasts.

products.title: Mija Calf Hair
products.description: The Mija belt in Italian calf hair, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, Silver buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Bodice Belt Suede Short
products.description: The Bodice Belt is structure and simplicity in one form. Sculpted like The Undone Corset, fastened with the signature Hollyhock buckle. A two-in-one silhouette made for intention and ease, designed to shape and define.

products.title: Flint Croco Silver
products.description: The Flint belt reimagines Western heritage through minimalist oval lines and sculptural silver-tone detailing, handcrafted in Italy for refined everyday impact.

products.title: Hollyhock Suede Gold
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian suede and 24K gold hardware.

products.title: Le Fil Suede
products.description: The Le Fil is a quiet contour : slender Italian leather, curved silver hardware, and sculptural intent distilled to its purest line.

products.title: Mija Lacquer Gold
products.description: The Mija belt in Italian lacquered leather, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, 24K gold-tone buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Mija Lacquer Silver
products.description: The Mija belt in Italian lacquered leather, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, silver-tone buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Mako Silver
products.description: The Mako belt is ease, woven. Hand-crafted in raffia with intricate weaving and a lightweight feel, it brings a relaxed, sun-warmed sensibility to sculptural form. Designed to cinch softly, it moves with the body and pairs effortlessly with spring dressing.

products.title: Mako Gold
products.description: The Mako belt is ease, woven. Hand-crafted in raffia with intricate weaving and a lightweight feel, it brings a relaxed, sun-warmed sensibility to sculptural form. Designed to cinch softly, it moves with the body and pairs effortlessly with spring dressing.

products.title: Mako Gold
products.description: The Mako belt is ease, woven. Hand-crafted in raffia with intricate weaving and a lightweight feel, it brings a relaxed, sun-warmed sensibility to sculptural form. Designed to cinch softly, it moves with the body and pairs effortlessly with spring dressing.

products.title: Undone Corset Buckled Rhinestone
products.description: The Undone Corset reimagines Déhanche’s signature silhouette with a buckle closure, sculpting the waist in a sleek, contoured design that stays effortlessly in place. Designed with hand-placed rhinestones.

products.title: Hollyhock Calf Hair
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Calf Hair and silver & 24K gold hardware.

products.title: Brandt Gold
products.description: The Brandt belt pairs minimalist elegance with a bold gold buckle, sculpting the silhouette in black luxurious Italian calfskin for a refined yet commanding finish.

products.title: Le Fil
products.description: The Le Fil is a quiet contour : slender Italian leather, curved silver hardware, and sculptural intent distilled to its purest line.

products.title: Hollyhock Silver
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian leather and silver hardware.

products.title: Revenge Suede
products.description: The Revenge belt reimagines punk defiance with pierced smooth Italian calfskin suede, with hand-placed silver grommets and rings that channel audacious, subversive elegance.

products.title: Sculpted Slide Silver
products.description: The Sculpted Slide in silver distills the essence of ’90s tee slides into a minimalist square form, an object of tension designed to shape fabric with precision and intent.

products.title: Sculpted Slide Gold
products.description: The Sculpted Slide reimagines the ’90s tee cinch as a high-polish gold square ring, an object of tension and intention, designed to shape rather than decorate.

products.title: Hollyhock Suede
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian calfskin suede and silver hardware.

products.title: Brandt Snake
products.description: The Brandt belt pairs minimalist elegance with a discrete silver buckle, cinching the silhouette in embossed snakeskin leather for a refined and commanding finish.

products.title: Mara Exotic Calf Hair
products.description: The Mara belt distills form to its essence : a slender silhouette anchored by a sculptural square buckle with softened edges. Crafted in Italy, it embodies restraint and precision, a study in proportion and elegance.

products.title: Mara Exotic Calf Hair
products.description: The Mara belt distills form to its essence : a slender silhouette anchored by a sculptural square buckle with softened edges. Crafted in Italy, it embodies restraint and precision, a study in proportion and elegance.

products.title: Single Wrap Richa Gold
products.description: The Single Wrap Richa reinterprets the best-selling Richa belt in a single-wrap form. Defined by hardware loops encircling the strap, it retains the belt’s decadent detailing while offering an easier to wear silhouette.

products.title: Koru
products.description: The one-sized Koru belt is a sculptural statement in soft Italian calfskin, defined by its curved and spiraled buckle and designed for the woman who dresses with intention and edge.

products.title: Single Wrap Richa Mixed Metal
products.description: The Single Wrap Richa reinterprets the best-selling Richa belt in a single-wrap form. Defined by hardware loops encircling the strap, it retains the belt’s decadent detailing while offering an easier to wear silhouette.

products.title: Single Wrap Richa Silver
products.description: The Single Wrap Richa reinterprets the best-selling Richa belt in a single-wrap form. Defined by hardware loops encircling the strap, it retains the belt’s decadent detailing while offering an easier to wear silhouette.

products.title: Flint Silver
products.description: The Flint belt reimagines Western heritage through minimalist oval lines and sculptural silver-tone detailing, handcrafted in Italy for refined everyday impact.

products.title: Mija Suede
products.description: The Mija belt in Italian calfskin suede, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, silver buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Constance Snake
products.description: The Constance belt defines modern refinement through a slightly slimmer silhouette, featuring two polished loops, embossed leather, and silver-tone hardware for a considered finish.

products.title: Altura Gold
products.description: Déhanche's latest thin belt, The Altura, polishes with ease. The minimal silhouette and sculpturally curved buckle add a discrete cinch to any look. Handcrafted in Italy with responsibly sourced calfskin leather.

products.title: Portia
products.description: The Portia belt is a sleek & maximalist low-rise belt. The new essential, defined by its wide body. Define your waist and sculpt in this supple-leather belt.

products.title: Hollyhock 10 Rivet Suede Gold
products.description: Déhanche's signature style features 5 ring adornments and 10 hand-placed grommeted holes, with an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Each piece is meticulously crafted from Italian suede and 24K gold plated hardware.

products.title: Hollyhock Suede Gold
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian suede and 24K gold hardware.

products.title: Versailles Suede Gold
products.description: The Versailles belt is an expression of baroque opulence. Ornamental and intricately composed, it layers 24K gold-plated hardware across supple Italian suede, forming a richly sculptural statement. Lavish in detail and unapologetically ornate, it reads as an heirloom expression of maximalism.

products.title: Colette Snake
products.description: The Colette belt distills Western cues into a sculptural, minimalist accent, pairing an oval-shaped silver buckle with embossed leather for a defined silhouette.

products.title: Vendome Gold
products.description: The Vendome belt celebrates ornament in its most decadent form. Sculptural hardware is enriched with enamel inlays, introducing depth and saturated color against its architectural structure. Crafted in Italian leather with gilded details, it reads as a richly layered statement, opulent, expressive, and unmistakably ornamental.

products.title: Vendome Gold
products.description: The Vendome belt celebrates ornament in its most decadent form. Sculptural hardware is enriched with enamel inlays, introducing depth and saturated color against its architectural structure. Crafted in Italian leather with gilded details, it reads as a richly layered statement, opulent, expressive, and unmistakably ornamental.

products.title: Santo Mixed Metal
products.description: The Santo is a western-inspired buckle rendered in mixed metals, with intricately carved detailing that evokes heritage ornamentation through a sculptural, contemporary lens.

products.title: Mara Silver
products.description: The Mara belt distills form to its essence : a slender silhouette anchored by a sculptural square buckle with softened edges. Crafted in Italy, it embodies restraint and precision, a study in proportion and elegance.

products.title: Alegra Mixed Metal
products.description: The Alegra belt refines modern minimalism, with its two rings and mixed metal hardware. A textured metallic accent at the buckle adds discreet polish, crafted in Italy from Italian leather for a sophisticated finish.

products.title: Lottie Mixed Metal
products.description: The Lottie belt refines Western heritage through a lens of subtle polish. Its slender form is defined by an ornate square buckle, made in silver and edged in gold. Designed for discretion, it speaks in texture and line.

products.title: Mara Gold
products.description: The Mara belt distills form to its essence : a slender silhouette anchored by a sculptural square buckle with softened edges. Crafted in Italy, it embodies restraint and precision, a study in proportion and elegance.

products.title: Mija Suede Gold
products.description: The Mija belt in Italian calfskin leather, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, 24K gold-tone buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Hollyhock Gold
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 10 holes to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian leather and 24K Gold hardware.

products.title: Elysées
products.description: The Élysées : the belt inspired by jewelry. Handcrafted in Italian calfskin, designed to slip through denim or graze over silk. Worn at the waist or low on the hips, it brings quiet structure to the undone, elegance to the everyday.

products.title: Richa Mixed Metal
products.description: The Richa refines restraint : sleek, elongated, and sculpted to wrap the waist with quiet intention. Crafted in smooth leather with polished hardware, it’s a minimalist evolution that sharpens the silhouette and leaves a lasting impression.

products.title: Hollyhock 10 Rivet Gold
products.description: Déhanche's signature style features 5 ring adornments and 10 hand-placed grommeted holes, with an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Each piece is meticulously crafted from Italian leather and 24K gold plated hardware.

products.title: Hollyhock 10 Rivet Silver
products.description: Déhanche's signature style features 5 ring adornments and 10 hand-placed grommeted holes, with an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Each piece is meticulously crafted from Italian leather and silver hardware.

products.title: Alcott Gold
products.description: A dramatic modification of Déhanche's signature Hollyhock belt. The Alcott holds a bold-asymmetrical silhouette and polishes with the classic 5-ring hardware accent.

products.title: Hollyhock Suede
products.description: Déhanche's signature style featuring 5 rings adornments with 10 holes and an extended strap length to accommodate a broader range of sizes. Meticulously crafted from Italian suede and 24K gold hardware.

products.title: Mija Snake
products.description: The Mija belt in embossed snakeskin leather, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, silver-tone buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Brancusi Choker Gold
products.description: The Brancusi Choker extends Déhanche’s sculptural language to the neckline. Defined by a fluid curved form, it echoes the purity and tension of Constantin Brâncuși’s bronze works. Hand-casted by jewelry artisans, the collar frames the décolletage with precise, deliberate, and unapologetically sculptural polishing.

products.title: Brancusi Choker Silver
products.description: The Brancusi Choker extends Déhanche’s sculptural language to the neckline. Defined by a fluid curved form, it echoes the purity and tension of Constantin Brâncuși’s bronze works. Hand-casted by jewelry artisans, the collar frames the décolletage with precise, deliberate, and unapologetically sculptural polishing.

products.title: Hollyhock Silver Necklace
products.description: The Hollyhock Necklace reimagines Déhanche’s signature rings in sculptural form. Five radiant metal shapes are suspended from a slim leather cord, grounded in contrast and proportion. Detailed with subtle Hollyhock accents at the nape and tip, it mirrors the architecture of the waist now worn at the collarbone, elemental, deliberate, and distinctly Déhanche.

products.title: Undone Corset
products.description: The Undone Corset belt sculpts a smooth, modern silhouette with sleek lines and thoughtful contours that elegantly accentuate the waist.

products.title: Mija Mirror Croco
products.description: The Mija belt in embossed croco leather, balances everyday ease and refined elegance with its sculpted silhouette, 24K Gold-tone buckle, and Italian craftsmanship.

products.title: Déhanche E-Gift Card
products.description: Give the gift of choice to a loved one, available in increments of 100 USD. Our digital gift cards are sent to the email supplied on the order. If you need further assistance, please reach out to care@dehanche.com.

products.title: Tetra Silver Earrings Small
products.description: A sculptural reflection of Déhanche’s best-selling belt. The Tetra Earring traces its form to the hand-hammered buckle of the Tetra, a design once inspired by jewelry, now returned to it. Cast in miniature with architectural precision, it embodies Déhanche’s language of proportion and permanence. Jewelry not as adornment, but as form, origin, and return.

products.title: Brancusi Silver Cuff
products.description: The Brancusi Cuff draws from the curved buckle of Déhanche’s iconic sculptural belt. Its silhouette a tribute to the brass works of Constantin Brancusi, cast in polished metal, the cuff wraps the arm with quiet conviction, merging minimalism with intention. Bold yet understated, it speaks to the woman who values design over ornament, presence over excess. A statement of character, sculpture create
